previousEOYShowPhotos-003-03-2026.jpg: A hyper-realistic sculptural figure with a deer head and human body in casual clothing sits on a patterned rug in a gallery corner, surrounded by paintings.
previousEOYShowPhotos-004-03-2026.jpg: A Fine Arts student holds a bouquet of flowers while standing in front of two large figurative oil paintings in warm earthy tones at an End of Year Show.
previousEOYShowPhotos-005-03-2026.jpg: A sculptural installation features antique wooden chairs filled with dried grasses and straw arranged on a woven mat beside a set dining table.
previousEOYShowPhotos-006-03-2026.jpg: Four students pose together in front of a large-scale typographic installation with oversized letterforms mounted on white panels during the End of Year Show.
previousEOYShowPhotos-007-03-2026.jpg: A student in a white outfit stands beside a table installation featuring a toaster, plates of food, hay, and wooden chairs arranged on a bare wood surface in an industrial exhibition hall.
previousEOYShowPhotos-008-03-2026.jpg: A large crowd of visitors moves through a wide-open exhibition hall lined with student work on panels and walls during the End of Year Show.
previousEOYShowPhotos-009-03-2026.jpg: Two visitors examine a colorful printed publication together at a display table, with framed photographs and a blue textile work visible on the wall behind them.
previousEOYShowPhotos-010-03-2026.jpg: Two visitors look closely at a diptych screen-based work displaying layered organic imagery in red and green, with clear cups and a can arranged on a shelf below.
previousEOYShowPhotos-011-03-2026.jpg: A Design student presents her branding project to a visitor at a table display, with a grid of colorful posters and a monitor behind her.
previousEOYShowPhotos-012-03-2026.jpg: Attendees browse an outdoor End of Year Show display table covered with printed materials, a potted plant, and colorful packaged objects.
previousEOYShowPhotos-013-03-2026.jpg: A large crowd fills the outdoor courtyard of CCA's campus for an End of Year Show opening, with spectators also gathered on rooftop overlooks.
previousEOYShowPhotos-014-03-2026.jpg: A Fashion student walks an outdoor runway in a yellow top, wide brown trousers, and large pink geometric accessories, with a seated crowd watching.
previousEOYShowPhotos-015-03-2026.jpg: Visitors examine a long table of geometric wire-and-fabric structural models at the CCA Architecture End of Year Show exhibition.
previousEOYShowPhotos-016-03-2026.jpg: Two visitors talk and laugh in front of a densely decorated End of Year Show booth covered in printed pattern wallpaper, framed artworks, and colorful graphic posters.
previousEOYShowPhotos-017-03-2026.jpg: Carved and assembled wooden objects — including geometric star forms, a mirror, a woven coaster, and engraved panels — are arranged on a round table edged with decorative stitching.
previousEOYShowPhotos-018-03-2026.jpg: Two terracotta-colored ceramic sculptures resembling textured claw-like hands emerge from a mound of soil on a white pedestal.
previousEOYShowPhotos-019-03-2026.jpg: A large industrial exhibition hall displays Graphic Design student work, including a mixed-media wall installation with collaged type, a video monitor, and painted panels under exposed steel trusses.
previousEOYShowPhotos-020-03-2026.jpg: An oil painting depicts a figure in a green blouse with painted facial markings, framed by a pink arch and orange flame motifs on a lavender background.
previousEOYShowPhotos-021-03-2026.jpg: A student sits on a handcrafted wooden bench in a bright studio space, surrounded by small ceramic objects and shelved items, with process photos pinned to a screen behind him.
previousEOYShowPhotos-022-03-2026.jpg: A student identified as Grace Sieg sits cross-legged on the floor in front of her End of Year Show display, which includes colorful sculptural forms, a process board, and spread-out printed materials.
previousEOYShowPhotos-023-03-2026.jpg: A student project display titled 'What Does This Meme?' features a white wall covered with printed internet memes and images arranged in a dense collage, with a QR code and instructional text panel.
previousEOYShowPhotos-024-03-2026.jpg: A student presents beside a large monitor showing scientific Schlieren technique imagery, with blue star-shaped sculptural forms on wooden dowels arranged on a pedestal nearby.
previousEOYShowPhotos-025-03-2026.jpg: A large accordion-folded painted screen depicting figurative scenes and Chinese calligraphy text stands open in an industrial exhibition hall with concrete walls and overhead strip lighting.
previousEOYShowPhotos-026-03-2026.jpg: A person uses mallets to play a cluster of dark, organic-form ceramic vessels arranged as a sculptural instrument during an End of Year Show.
previousEOYShowPhotos-027-03-2026.jpg: A Fine Arts student stands covered in soil beside a mound of dirt on a white pedestal, with large paintings of blue-and-white porcelain vases on colorful geometric backgrounds behind her.
previousEOYShowPhotos-028-03-2026.jpg: A large-scale printed fabric work depicting a crowd scene with animal imagery hangs from chains in an exhibition space, with visitors standing nearby.
previousEOYShowPhotos-029-03-2026.jpg: A grid of hand-carved relief tiles in copper, black, and teal displays a variety of abstract and figurative motifs across the entire composition.
